questions.question: What is the purpose of using MDM to manage FDA permissions on macOS devices?
questions.justification: The synthesis text explains that using MDM to manage FDA permissions on macOS devices helps enterprises ensure compliance, consistency, and security, as opposed to the time-consuming and error-prone manual process.

questions.question: What are the key settings in the PPPC profile that grant FDA permissions?
questions.justification: The synthesis text provides some details on the key settings in the PPPC profile, such as the PayloadType, Services, Authorization, Identifier, and CodeRequirement, but does not fully explain all the settings.

questions.question: How does the automated device enrollment (ADE) process work to ensure all company devices are managed by MDM?
questions.justification: The synthesis text explains the core concepts and steps of the ADE process, including registering with Apple Business Manager, linking the MDM server, assigning devices, and setting up the enrollment profile to ensure all new devices are automatically enrolled and supervised by the MDM.

suppression_decision.reason: No Derived-tier claims checked; semantic scorer skipped
